notes: Act as a section manager for Paper 7 publishability. You may launch up to six worker descendants with distinct orchestrator ids and parent metadata if useful. Workers are leaves and may not spawn descendants. Keep writes scoped to matter/Higgs/Yukawa/CKM and Paper7Receipt composition modules. Construct exact Gate 7/8 receipt surfaces where possible and identify the first upstream blockers where not. Do not set terminalClaimPromoted=true unless Gates 1-7 and authority boundaries are already present and validated.
